permissions.fallback_msg: The calendar skill needs to read ICS/calendar files from your workspace. Allow this operation?
The calendar skill needs to write or create ICS/calendar files in your workspace. Allow this operation?
The calendar skill needs to execute shell commands (e.g., pip install, Python one-liners for ICS validation). Allow this operation?
The calendar skill needs to install Python packages (icalendar, pytz) to support calendar operations. Allow this operation?
The calendar skill may need to fetch external resources such as RFC specifications or timezone data. Allow this operation?
